name: Rahul Sushank Monga
title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Lead
base_skills: Programming Languages: C#, Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
Frontend Development: React, Vue.js, Angular, AngularJS, Next.js, Redux, NgRx, RxJS, SPA Development, PWA Development, Responsive Web Design, Material UI, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS

Backend Development: .NET, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, Java Spring Boot, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL APIs, Microservices Architecture, Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA), Domain Driven Design (DDD), Clean Architecture, Dependency Injection

Cloud Platforms: Microsoft Azure, Azure App Services, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Functions, Azure Service Bus, Azure Storage, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure SQL, AWS EC2, AWS Lambda, AWS S3, AWS RDS

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning: Python ML pipelines, Predictive analytics, Recommendation systems, Natural Language Processing (NLP) integration, AI-powered search systems, Anomaly detection, Intelligent automation
Microservices & Distributed Systems: Event-driven architecture, CQRS, API Gateway patterns, Distributed messaging systems, Asynchronous processing, Redis caching, High availability system design
DevOps & CI/CD: Docker, Kubernetes, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Terraform, Infrastructure as Code, Automated build pipelines
Databases: SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, NoSQL databases, Entity Framework, Entity Framework Core, LINQ, Query optimization, Indexing strategies
Security: OAuth2, OpenID Connect, JWT Authentication, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), API Security, Secure coding practices
Testing: Unit Testing, Integration Testing, Test Driven Development (TDD), xUnit, NUnit, Moq, Selenium, Automated UI Testing
Monitoring & Performance: Azure Application Insights, Prometheus, Grafana, Distributed tracing, Structured logging, Performance tuning
Tools & Methodologies: Visual Studio, VS Code, Postman, Swagger/OpenAPI, Git, Jira, Confluence, Agile, Scrum, Kanban

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Lead
base_bullets: Designed and implemented scalable backend services using ASP.NET Core and Java Spring Boot, enabling high-throughput processing and ensuring system reliability, maintainability, and extensibility across enterprise-level workloads and complex distributed environments.

Architected and developed reusable REST and GraphQL APIs using .NET Core and Java, improving cross-team integration efficiency and enabling frontend applications built with React, Vue.js, and Angular to consume consistent, well-defined service contracts.

Built event-driven systems using Azure Service Bus and Java-based consumers, enabling asynchronous processing, improved system decoupling, and better handling of high-volume workloads across distributed services.

Optimized backend performance by tuning Entity Framework queries, Java persistence layers, indexing strategies, and caching mechanisms, significantly reducing latency and improving throughput for critical platform services.

Developed secure authentication and authorization frameworks using OAuth2, OpenID Connect, and JWT, ensuring secure communication across both .NET and Java microservices in a distributed cloud environment.

Containerized backend services using Docker and orchestrated deployments on Azure Kubernetes Service, ensuring high availability, scalability, and efficient resource utilization across production workloads.

Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions, automating build, test, and deployment processes for both .NET and Java services, improving release velocity and consistency.

Integrated machine learning capabilities into backend services using Python pipelines connected to .NET and Java systems, enabling predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and intelligent automation features.
Optimized MSSQL queries and relational database management for high-performance applications.
Implemented event-driven architectures using Kafka and Kinesis, enabling real-time data streaming and processing across distributed services.
Integrated Large Language Models (LLMs) for AI-driven predictive features and enhanced search capabilities within backend services.
Implemented structured logging, distributed tracing, and monitoring using Application Insights, Prometheus, and Grafana, improving observability and enabling faster debugging and incident resolution.

Led a team of engineers in designing and delivering a large-scale platform built on C# (.NET Core) and Java microservices, driving technical direction, mentoring developers, and ensuring consistent engineering standards across distributed system development efforts.
